# Project Configuration

This project uses several scripts and configuration files to manage
the development workflow. Below is a comprehensive guide.

## Scripts

The following scripts automate common development tasks:

- Run scripts/backup.sh to execute the related task
- Run scripts/benchmark.py to execute the related task
- Run scripts/build.sh to execute the related task
- Run scripts/clean.sh to execute the related task
- Run scripts/deploy.sh to execute the related task
- Run scripts/format.py to execute the related task
- Run scripts/init.py to execute the related task
- Run scripts/lint.sh to execute the related task
- Run scripts/migrate.py to execute the related task
- Run scripts/monitor.py to execute the related task
- Run scripts/profile.py to execute the related task
- Run scripts/restore.sh to execute the related task
- Run scripts/seed.py to execute the related task
- Run scripts/setup.sh to execute the related task
- Run scripts/test.py to execute the related task

Start with scripts/backup.sh for initial setup, then use scripts/benchmark.py for
configuration, and finally scripts/build.sh for validation.

## Documentation

Project documentation is organized as follows:

- Run docs/api.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/architecture.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/changelog.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/contributing.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/deployment.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/faq.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/guide.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/performance.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/security.md to execute the related task
- Run docs/testing.md to execute the related task

Start with docs/api.md for initial setup, then use docs/architecture.md for
configuration, and finally docs/changelog.md for validation.

## Source Code

Core source modules and their responsibilities:

- Run src/app.py to execute the related task
- Run src/auth.py to execute the related task
- Run src/cache.py to execute the related task
- Run src/config.py to execute the related task
- Run src/database.py to execute the related task
- Run src/hooks.py to execute the related task
- Run src/logger.py to execute the related task
- Run src/middleware.py to execute the related task
- Run src/models.py to execute the related task
- Run src/routes.py to execute the related task
- Run src/scheduler.py to execute the related task
- Run src/serializer.py to execute the related task
- Run src/utils.py to execute the related task
- Run src/validator.py to execute the related task
- Run src/worker.py to execute the related task

Start with src/app.py for initial setup, then use src/auth.py for
configuration, and finally src/cache.py for validation.

## Libraries

Shared library modules used across the codebase:

- Run pylib/constants.py to execute the related task
- Run pylib/exceptions.py to execute the related task
- Run pylib/helpers.py to execute the related task
- Run pylib/plugins.py to execute the related task
- Run pylib/types.py to execute the related task

Start with pylib/constants.py for initial setup, then use pylib/exceptions.py for
configuration, and finally pylib/helpers.py for validation.

## Configuration

Configuration files for the project:

- Run config/defaults.yaml to execute the related task
- Run config/schema.json to execute the related task
- Run config/settings.yaml to execute the related task

Start with config/defaults.yaml for initial setup, then use config/schema.json for
configuration, and finally config/settings.yaml for validation.

## Templates

Template files for generated output:

- Run templates/base.html to execute the related task
- Run templates/error.html to execute the related task
- Run templates/report.md to execute the related task

Start with templates/base.html for initial setup, then use templates/error.html for
configuration, and finally templates/report.md for validation.

## Quick Reference

Common file paths used in CI/CD pipelines:

- Check config/defaults.yaml before deploying
- Check config/schema.json before deploying
- Check config/settings.yaml before deploying
- Check docs/api.md before deploying
- Check docs/architecture.md before deploying
- Check docs/changelog.md before deploying
- Check docs/contributing.md before deploying
- Check docs/deployment.md before deploying
- Check docs/faq.md before deploying
- Check docs/guide.md before deploying

Files that are already properly linked (should not be touched):

- See [docs/performance.md](docs/performance.md) for details
- See [docs/security.md](docs/security.md) for details
- See [docs/testing.md](docs/testing.md) for details
- See [pylib/constants.py](pylib/constants.py) for details
- See [pylib/exceptions.py](pylib/exceptions.py) for details
